commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6634ba99a53990f4fb7d17fe9fbce824a5c07ce4)
commands.review_summary:
The PR prevents `activate:false` tool-discovery registry loads from replacing the active plugin registry, tracks workspaceDir per pinned surface, and extends `tools.catalog` metadata projection to the channel registry.

PR surface: Source +73, Tests +121. Total +194 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main promotes `activate:false` tool-discovery registries to active, and the PR body includes before/after terminal output showing providers stay at 1 after the guard; I did not run the repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused repair can address the mechanical blockers: initialize the optional test metadata array and make tool catalog/tool resolution use the pinned tool registry when channel snapshot selection falls back to active.
